meanings.definition: cut or cut through with shears
examples: shear the wool off the lamb

meanings.definition: become deformed by forces tending to produce a shearing strain
having the hair or wool cut or clipped off as if with shears or clippers
examples: picked up the baby's shorn curls from the floor

meanings.definition: (used especially of fur or wool) shaped or finished by cutting or trimming to a uniform length
